info.title: salesforce
info.description: A command-line tool that enables Salesforce Access and Refresh Tokens Generation.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Execute-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: cli tool to help with Salesforce development by providing with Refresh token generation.

commands.name: get-tokens
commands.description: Generates Salesforce Access and Refresh Tokens

options.name: --login
options.description: The Salesforce login url. The default value is https://login.salesforce.com.

options.name: --azure
options.description: Allows to specify Azure Vault Url. It overrides url specified in the appsetting.json file or any other configuration provider.

options.name: --azureprefix
options.description: Enables or disables Hosting Environment prefix to be used for Azure Key Vault. Default is true.

options.name: --configfile
options.description: Allows to specify a configuration file besides appsettings.json to be specified.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Allows Verbose logging for the tool. Enable this to get tracing information. Default is false and LogLevel.None.

options.name: --environment
options.description: Specify Hosting Environment Name for the cli tool execution.

options.name: --section
options.description: Configuration Section Name to retrieve the options. The Default value is Salesforce.
